title: [1주차 마무리] 1~5형식 총정리 실전 훈련 (100문제)
instruction: 다음 문장의 형식을 밝히고, 문장 성분(S, V, O, C)을 표시한 후 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: The little bird sings beautifully.

answer.analysis: The little bird(S) sings(V) (beautifully).

problems.stem: My mother is a great cook.

answer.analysis: My mother(S) is(V) a great cook(C).

problems.stem: I finished my report this morning.

answer.analysis: I(S) finished(V) my report(O) (this morning).
answer.translation: 나는 오늘 아침에 내 보고서를 끝냈다.

problems.stem: She sent her friend a birthday card.

answer.analysis: She(S) sent(V) her friend(IO) a birthday card(DO).

problems.stem: We consider this problem serious.

answer.analysis: We(S) consider(V) this problem(O) serious(OC).

problems.stem: The train arrived late at night.

answer.analysis: The train(S) arrived(V) (late at night).

problems.stem: This pizza tastes delicious.

problems.stem: He bought a new laptop for his work.

answer.analysis: He(S) bought(V) a new laptop(O) (for his work).
answer.translation: 그는 자신의 일을 위해 새 노트북을 샀다.

problems.stem: The coach made him the team captain.

answer.analysis: The coach(S) made(V) him(O) the team captain(OC).

problems.stem: Can you pass me the salt?

answer.analysis: you(S) Can pass(V) me(IO) the salt(DO)?

problems.stem: The leaves are turning brown.

problems.stem: I don't believe his story.

problems.stem: The company offered her a promotion.

problems.stem: The movie made the audience cry.

problems.stem: The earth revolves around the sun.

answer.analysis: Her voice(S) sounds(V) very sweet(C).

problems.stem: My father taught me how to ride a bike.

answer.analysis: My father(S) taught(V) me(IO) how to ride a bike(DO).
answer.translation: 아버지는 나에게 자전거 타는 법을 가르쳐주셨다.

problems.stem: The judge declared the man innocent.

problems.stem: The scientist discovered a new star.

answer.analysis: The scientist(S) discovered(V) a new star(O).

problems.stem: I will make you some coffee.

problems.stem: My friends call me Andy.

problems.stem: This fabric feels very soft.

problems.stem: I want my room clean.

problems.stem: The old man lived alone in a small hut.

problems.stem: Her dream finally came true.

problems.stem: The meeting will start at 3 PM.

problems.stem: The sky grew dark.

answer.analysis: The sky(S) grew(V) dark(C).

problems.stem: I respect your opinion.

answer.analysis: I(S) respect(V) your opinion(O).

problems.stem: The chef cooked us a special meal.

answer.analysis: The chef(S) cooked(V) us(IO) a special meal(DO).

problems.stem: The class found the lecture boring.

problems.stem: The river flows to the sea.

answer.analysis: The river(S) flows(V) (to the sea).

problems.stem: The population of the city is increasing.

problems.stem: The long walk made my legs tired.

answer.analysis: The guests(S) arrived(V) (one by one).
